batches.title: Add the domain behavior
batches.objective: Implement one coherent, independently testable behavior without changing unrelated runtime areas.
acceptance_criteria: The approved behavior is implemented exactly as specified.
Existing behavior remains unchanged outside the approved slice.
No critical or high-severity review findings remain.
human_stop_conditions: A destructive migration or irreversible data change is required.
Secrets or authentication configuration must change.
The implementation must expand beyond allowed paths.
